regime_fall.current_status: US-Israeli coalition has executed 13,000+ strikes including 600+ IDF strikes on missile sites and 200+ B-2 strikes on Isfahan targets, while Iran retaliates with threats against GCC targets and demonstrates operational resilience through intact IRGC command structure and precision strikes; regime faces succession consolidation under Mojtaba Khamenei, IRGC hardliner dominance, economic strain with 150% security spending increase, and escalating domestic protests amid diplomatic deadlock.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Iran issued April 1, 2026 warning of no extension on strategic deadline and readiness to continue war with potential ground invasion response, while IRGC threatened targeting US companies and bases across GCC countries starting April 1 in retaliation for Isfahan strikes.
